title: Loop Analysis Output Schema
description: Defines the expected JSON output contract for a single-loop behavioral friction analysis produced by the Loop Leak Detector Automation.

loop_summary.description: One to two factual sentences describing the observed behavioral pattern. No psychological inference beyond what the event data directly supports.
examples: The object 'Senior Product Manager - Acme Corp' was opened 7 times across 6 separate sessions in a 7-day window with no application, discard, or commitment action recorded.
The draft 'Q1 Report' was edited 5 times across 4 sessions with no send or submit event observed.

loop_type.description: Classified type of the detected behavioral loop.

friction_category.description: The most likely category of friction or blocker driving the loop pattern.

severity_level.description: Estimated severity of the attention leak created by this loop.

estimated_attention_leak.description: Estimated magnitude of attention being consumed by this recurring loop.

supporting_patterns.description: Array of short factual observations drawn directly from the event data that support the loop classification.

items.description: One factual observation. No interpretation or psychological inference.
examples: 1 defer event on day 4 followed by resumed revisit

likely_blocker.description: The most probable friction cause based strictly on the event data. Null if the data does not support a specific inference.
examples: Unclear application criteria or unresolved uncertainty about fit
No defined send threshold — draft is refined without a closure condition

recommended_intervention.description: One specific, actionable intervention directly tied to the loop type and friction category. Not generic advice.
examples: Define a binary apply/discard rule based on one specific criterion before the next open
Set a word-count limit or send-by date to create a forcing function for the draft

recommended_next_step.description: The single smallest useful move available to interrupt the loop right now.
examples: Open the listing one final time with a preset 5-minute decision timer
Set the draft to send tomorrow morning regardless of current state

confidence_band.description: Confidence level of the analysis based on event count, time window coverage, and pattern clarity.

needs_human_review.description: True if the pattern is ambiguous, contradictory, borderline, required significant assumption, or has critical severity. False otherwise.

review_reason.description: Required if needs_human_review is true. Explains what triggered the review flag. Null if needs_human_review is false.
examples: Critical severity flagged — human review recommended before acting on this result
JSON parse failure — model output could not be validated

examples.loop_summary: The object 'Senior Product Manager - Acme Corp' was opened 7 times across 6 separate sessions in a 7-day window with no application, discard, or commitment action recorded.
supporting_patterns: 1 defer event on day 4 with subsequent resumption of revisit
examples.likely_blocker: Unclear application criteria or unresolved uncertainty about fit
examples.recommended_intervention: Define a binary apply/discard rule based on one specific criterion before the next open
examples.recommended_next_step: Open the listing one final time with a preset 5-minute decision timer
